title: Monster Strike and Evangelion mobile game collaboration

wikitext:
[]: Monster Strike and Evangelion mobile game collaboration             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Apr 26, 2015 2:31 pm So busy these days I don't do much on my pseudo-tablet, but for those that like their mobile games: tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]:             Quote Post by Dima » Sun Apr 26, 2015 3:34 pm I heard that Monster Strike is huge in Japan. More than PxZ. Are they making other collaborations too like PxZ? Unfortunately Monster Strike is not available in my country so i never tried it :(
